title: Maestro: Terraria
description: Brings Terraria's reactive soundtrack into Minecraft, powered by Maestro!
body:
###
Maestro: Terraria brings Terraria's reactive soundtrack into Minecraft – carefully adapted with smooth orchestration, layered transitions, and seamless integration into gameplay.


## Extensive Music Coverage The pack features unique music across the Overworld, The Nether, and The End, with additional themes for biomes, villages, dungeons, boss fights, raids, weather events, and multiple world depth levels. Each situation transitions naturally into the next, ensuring consistent atmosphere without abrupt cuts or repetition. ## Advanced Usage Example Maestro: Terraria can also serve as a reference implementation for developing your own music packs with Maestro. The project demonstrates advanced use of track priorities, layered orchestration and composite conditions working together in a real production setup. You can explore the full source and structure on [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/ObscuriaLithium/maestro-terraria).


## Requires Maestro Maestro: Overture is a music resource pack and requires the [Maestro](https://modrinth.com/mod/maestro-music) mod to function. Without Maestro, the pack will not affect music playback. ## Attribution & Disclaimer Maestro: Terraria uses music from the **Terraria Original Soundtrack**. Terraria and its soundtrack are the intellectual property of **Re-Logic**. This resource pack is an unofficial fan-made project created for entertainment purposes. No ownership of the original music is claimed. All rights to the soundtrack belong to their respective copyright holders.
